blockingIssues.description: `src/ui/BrandMark.tsx` only renders the ghost SVG, while the required wordmark and tagline remain inline in `src/editor/EditorView.tsx`. The feature did not fully extract the reusable brand mark into `@/ui`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify whether `frontend-design` invocation and RED-first test ordering are mandatory for every assigned task, and add an explicit exemption or alternate path for config-only, token-manifest, or small extraction work. Also avoid assigning this UI-focused skill to non-UI maintenance features like ESLint config.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for foundation-design-tokens, fix-eslint-config, foundation-extract-brandmark-panelheader, foundation-extract-statblock-recdot-kbdhint, and foundation-extract-toolbarbutton-iconbtn all reported drift between the current frontend-redesign procedure and real worker behavior or feature assignment.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align the mission validation gate with the repo root AGENTS guidance so workers and reviewers have one source of truth for completion. Either require `npm test` explicitly or document when frontend-only validation is acceptable.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The toolbarbutton/iconbtn review noted that repo-root AGENTS.md requires `npm test`, while the mission AGENTS.md and corresponding handoff accepted only frontend tests, typecheck, and lint.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit commit-staging guidance to avoid `git add -A` for feature work and to forbid bundling unrelated documentation changes into implementation commits unless the task specifically requests docs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The foundation-extract-toolbarbutton-iconbtn review found unrelated `docs/` files included in commit `1e59a1e` after broad staging, despite the repo instruction not to update documentation unless requested.

rejectedObservations.observation: The token-manifest tests do not assert that `src/ui/tokens.ts` stays in sync with `src/index.css`.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as a shared-state update because it is a feature-specific test-gap observation, not a factual services/library addition or a clear AGENTS/skill guidance change.

rejectedObservations.observation: Multiple reviews noted that the frontend-redesign skill requires `frontend-design` at session start.
rejectedObservations.reason: Duplicate observation merged into a single synthesized recommendation about frontend-redesign skill scope and procedure drift.
